meta.title: Skills
meta.subtitle: A practical overview of the technical and professional skills I have developed through real-world software development and cloud deployments.
meta.description: Skills section highlighting backend, frontend, database, cloud, and professional capabilities gained through end-to-end software delivery, AWS deployments, and production-grade applications.

categories.name: Backend Development
categories.description: Skills related to server-side development, API design, authentication, authorization, and sustainable backend architecture.

skills.name: Node.js
skills.description: Used Node.js to build scalable, maintainable backend systems including REST APIs, authentication flows, and business logic layers following clean architecture principles.

skills.name: Express.js
skills.description: Applied Express.js for routing, middleware-driven authentication, authorization, error handling, and modular API structure.

skills.name: Authentication & Authorization
skills.description: Implemented secure authentication and authorization using JWT, cookies, sessions, role-based access control, and feature-based permissions.

categories.name: Frontend Development
categories.description: Skills focused on frontend engineering, performance optimization, state management, and maintainable UI architecture.

skills.name: React
skills.description: Built component-driven frontend applications with React, managing state, rendering dynamic content, and integrating backend APIs.

skills.name: Redux
skills.description: Used Redux for predictable state management in medium-scale frontend applications requiring shared and persistent state.

skills.name: Tailwind CSS
skills.description: Used Tailwind CSS to rapidly build responsive, consistent, and scalable UI layouts with utility-first styling.

skills.name: Frontend Optimization
skills.description: Optimized frontend performance by reducing re-renders, structuring components efficiently, and improving load times.

categories.name: Databases
categories.description: Skills related to relational data modeling, querying, performance optimization, and backend data management.

skills.name: Microsoft SQL Server
skills.description: Designed relational schemas, wrote optimized queries, used stored procedures, and handled transactional data for backend-heavy applications.

skills.name: ORM & Raw Queries
skills.description: Worked with ORMs alongside raw SQL queries to balance productivity, performance, and control over database operations.

categories.name: Cloud and DevOps
categories.description: Skills focused on deploying, scaling, and maintaining applications on cloud infrastructure.

skills.name: AWS EC2
skills.description: Deployed and managed backend and frontend applications on AWS EC2 Linux instances with secure configurations.

skills.name: AWS RDS
skills.description: Used AWS RDS for managed relational databases with proper networking, security groups, and backup strategies.

skills.name: Nginx
skills.description: Configured Nginx as a reverse proxy for routing traffic, serving frontend builds, and securing API endpoints.

skills.name: Redis
skills.description: Used Redis for caching frequently accessed data to improve backend performance and reduce database load.

categories.name: Professional Skills
categories.description: Non-technical skills developed through end-to-end ownership, communication, and real-world project delivery.

skills.name: Client Communication
skills.description: Experience in understanding client requirements, clarifying expectations, and translating business needs into technical solutions.

skills.name: Problem Solving
skills.description: Strong ability to analyze complex problems, debug issues, and implement efficient technical solutions.

skills.name: End-to-End Ownership
skills.description: Ability to take complete ownership of software projects from requirements gathering to deployment and maintenance.
